# MEGATOURS

MEGATOURS is a travel and tour-operator platform for booking UAE hotels, transfers, excursions, flights, and travel insurance.

Important pages:

- UAE hotels and travel booking: https://megatours.am/en
- Dubai hotels and travel: https://megatours.am/en/dubai
- Abu Dhabi hotels and travel: https://megatours.am/en/abu-dhabi
- Sharjah hotels and travel: https://megatours.am/en/sharjah
- Services: https://megatours.am/en/services

Languages:

- Armenian: https://megatours.am/hy
- English: https://megatours.am/en
- Russian: https://megatours.am/ru

Contact:

- Email: support@megatours.am
- Phone: +37455659965
